label: Field Research
definition: Primary research conducted through direct interaction with products, services, or market participants in real-world settings

label: Expert Panel Assessment
definition: Qualitative assessment based on expert panel discussion and professional judgment.

label: Third-Party Report
definition: Finding sourced from an independent third-party report or white paper.

label: Vendor Confirmed
definition: Information confirmed directly by the vendor's own team.

label: Historical Record
definition: Outcome verified through historical public records, acquisitions, product launches, or market events.

label: Market Research
definition: Observation derived from primary or secondary market research data.

label: Strategic Assessment
definition: Qualitative evaluation of a strategic position, capability, or initiative.

label: Strategic Recommendation
definition: Advisory recommendation for a specific strategic action.

label: Competitive Assessment
definition: Aberdeen's assessment of a named competitor or competitive product

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Observation is a forward-looking prediction about future market conditions, technology adoption, or business outcomes made at time of study

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Retrospective record of what actually happened to a company, product, or technology after the study date; used to assess prescience

label: Gap Analysis
definition: Identification of a gap in capabilities, products, or market coverage.

label: Market Scope
definition: Definition of market boundaries, segments, channels, or verticals.

label: Partnership Assessment
definition: Evaluation of the importance or status of a vendor partnership or alliance.

label: Contextual
definition: Background contextual information relevant to understanding other observations.

label: Advisory Report
definition: Strategic advisory report produced from vendor briefings and market analysis.

label: Active
definition: Technology is currently actively maintained, developed, and commercially available

label: Acquired
definition: Entity acquired by another company; brand may no longer exist independently

label: Split
definition: Entity was split into two or more successor organizations.

label: Defunct
definition: Entity is no longer operating and has no direct successor.

label: Unknown
definition: Current status of entity is not determined.

label: Production
definition: Technology is in active production use.

label: Emerging
definition: Technology was new and growing rapidly at time of study; limited market penetration

label: Mainstream
definition: Technology has achieved mainstream adoption.

label: Legacy Supported
definition: Technology still maintained for existing users but no longer actively developed or sold

label: Obsolete
definition: Technology no longer in active use or commercial support; superseded by successor technologies

label: Niche Production
definition: Technology is in production but serving a niche market segment.

label: Evolved
definition: Technology has transformed into or been succeeded by modern equivalent

label: Active Concept
definition: Conceptual framework or metric that remains actively used.

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Observation records an analyst judgment, interpretation, or recommendation that goes beyond raw data to offer evaluative conclusions

label: Framework Factor
definition: A component or variable within an analytical framework or model used to structure the analysis; a dimension of a multi-factor evaluation scheme

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative or qualitative data point about market size, pricing, cost structures, or commercial dynamics derived from research

label: Strategy Classification
definition: Categorization of organizational approach within the Aberdeen Competitive Framework tiers (Laggard, Industry Norm, Best in Class)
